Committee on Immunization Practices (ACIP). 

CMS defines IRASA as the difference between the beneficiary cost sharing for the covered insulin, or 
ACIP-recommended vaccine, under the plan’s 2023 benefit design, and the applicable statutory 
maximum cost sharing ($35 for insulins and $0 for vaccines). The IRASA is available only for 2023. 
Additional details are available from CMS (reference: 
https://www.cms.gov/files/documen
